questions.question: Which is the largest planet in our solar system?
Who wrote the national anthem of India?
What will be the Simple Interest on a principal amount of Rs. 2200 at an interest rate of 11% per annum over 5 years?
If an article is bought for Rs. 310 and sold at a profit of 10%, what is the selling price?
questions.trick: Calculate 10% of CP, multiply, and add it conceptually.

questions.question: What is the average of the following 5 consecutive even numbers: 45, 47, 49, 51, 53?
questions.trick: For a consecutive arithmetic sequence, the average is simply the exact middle term.

questions.question: Who was the first President of India?
Find the next number in the series: 10, 15, 20, 25, 30, ?
questions.explanation: The series follows an Arithmetic Progression with a constant difference of 5. So, 30 + (5) = 35.
questions.trick: Always check the difference between the first and second terms and verify across the series.

questions.question: Find the odd one out among the following numbers: 25, 16, 9, 65
questions.explanation: 9, 16, and 25 are perfect squares. 65 is not a perfect square.
questions.trick: Memorize squares up to 30 to instantly spot discrepancies.

questions.question: A can complete a piece of work in 10 days while B can complete the same work in 20 days. If they work together, in how many days will they complete the work?
questions.explanation: Work = 10 * 20 = 200. Rate = 10 + 20 = 30. Time = Work / Rate = 6.67 days.

questions.question: Which is the longest river in the world?
Find the next number in the series: 3, 6, 12, 24, ?
questions.explanation: The series follows a Geometric Progression with a constant multiplier ratio of 2. So, 24 * 2 = 48.
questions.trick: If numbers scale up very quickly, look for multiplication rather than addition.

questions.question:
Statements:
1. All Cars are Trucks.
2. All Trucks are Vehicles.

Which conclusion logically follows?
questions.explanation: If A is a subset of B, and B is a subset of C, then A must be a subset of C completely.
questions.trick: Draw a venn diagram: Small circle A inside Medium B inside Large C.
